items.title: How Alex Freeman's Pro Bowl dad helped him live hi...
items.summary: Antonio Freeman taught son Alex what it takes to be a pro. It was his mom and his stepdad, though, who taught the USMNT defender to love soccer.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Bangladesh bat first, make three changes in search of consolation win
items.summary: Australia named an unchanged side as they look to whitewash the T20 series
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: How Murray was tempted back to tennis - and would he ever do a Serena?
items.summary: British tennis icon Andy Murray discusses returning to coaching with Jack Draper, Serena Williams' comeback and filling the void of not playing.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
